official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound projectile_power body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns projectile_power to packet id 0x87.
The generated fixture uses entity id 12345 and accelerationPower 2.5.
The official body is entity id VarInt followed by accelerationPower double.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded entity id, decoded accelerationPower, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove projectile entity existence, acceleration behavior, world state, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer projectile entity existence, acceleration behavior, world state, or client-load completion.
